'''''ATK 253''''' was a [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttle]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. When [[Biggs Darklighter/Legends|Biggs Darklighter's]] [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]], carrying schematics for the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]], broke down, ''ATK 253'' was one of three shuttles sent, under [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboat]] escort, to [[Rescue of Biggs Darklighter|capture]] the fighter. The shuttle was destroyed by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[R-22 Spearhead starfighter|R-22 Spearheads]], sent to protect the disabled X-wing until a repair team arrived.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']] {{1st}}
